title: 25/50 Metres Double Sided Satin Ribbon Rolls 3mm 6mm 10mm 15mm 25mm 38mm 50mm (Bright Gold, 50 Metres x 3mm)
features: Premium Quality Double Sided Satin Ribbon Rolls
Available in a range of colours - Simply select your required width and colour!
description: Premium Quality Double Sided Satin Ribbon Rolls Available in widths of 3mm, 6mm, 10mm, 15mm, 25mm, 38mm and 50mm Available in a range of colours - Simply select your required width and colour! These high quality ribbons are perfect for making bows, gifts, wedding invitations, cake decorating, arts & crafts, floristry, scrapbooks etc! All our 25/50 metre rolls are supplied on a roll 38mm and 50mm ribbons will be supplied neatly wrapped around a piece of card
